research.title: Parallel Claude Code Sessions with Git Worktrees: A Production Setup
research.whyTrending: Anthropic's internal team reports running 10-15 parallel Claude sessions as their #1 productivity tip. Teams using git worktrees report 18% throughput improvement. The claude -w flag makes worktrees first-class but production patterns (merge strategies, review queues, context hygiene) remain undocumented
